---
name: New ability proposal
about: Propose a new anime-style ability for Aether
labels: enhancement, ability
---

## Ability name

<!-- E.g. "Lightning Dragon Roar", "Hadoken", "Force Push". -->

## Source / reference

<!-- Anime, game, or original design. Linking a clip or screenshots helps a lot. -->

## Pose

<!-- Describe the *static* hand pose. Single hand or two? Which fingers
extended? Roughly where in front of the body? -->

## Charge cue

<!-- How long does the user hold the pose before the ability "completes"?
What should change visually during charging? -->

## Release motion (if any)

<!-- Forward thrust? Hands shooting apart? Rotation? Or is it a continuous
ability that stays live while the pose holds? -->

## Visual specification

<!-- Colours, particles, geometry. The more concrete, the easier to
implement faithfully. -->

## Why it'd be cool

<!-- Sell it. Aether prioritises iconic, recognisable abilities. -->
